title: Template Demo
description: A demonstration of the 4weird game template showing all standard features and conventions.

maker.name: MattyJacks
maker.bio: Founder of 4weird Games and MattyJacks.com. I build AI-powered development tools and browser games. This template demonstrates the standardized structure for all 4weird games - including shared components, credits sections, and maker bios. Every game on the platform follows this format to ensure consistency and maintainability.

instructions: Move the glowing orb around the screen. Press SPACE to change colors. Try to keep the orb within the bounds. This is a template demonstration showing how all 4weird games work.
